fields.label: Fast2SMS API Key
fields.description: API key from Fast2SMS dashboard

fields.label: DLT Sender ID
fields.description: Optional. e.g. DINMAT for DLT route

fields.label: DLT Template ID
fields.description: Optional. Message ID from DLT Manager for OTP template

fields.label: Borzo API Token
fields.description: Business API token from Borzo dashboard

fields.label: Borzo Webhook Token
fields.description: Optional. Token to verify Borzo webhooks

fields.label: Google Maps API Key
fields.description: API key for Google Maps integration (must have Places and Roads API enabled)

fields.label: GOLD Upgrade Barrier (Legacy)
fields.description: Legacy ₹1,299 wallet-balance unlock barrier. Retired in the May 2026 single-tier model — GOLD onboarding is now free. Default kept as 0.0 so legacy clients reading this value receive a no-op.

fields.label: Evolution API Global Key
fields.description: The API_KEY set in docker-compose

fields.label: Evolution API Instance Name
fields.description: The instance you created in the Evolution dashboard (e.g. Flamezo)

fields.label: Meta Permanent Access Token
fields.description: System User Access Token from Meta Developer Console

fields.label: Meta Phone Number ID
fields.description: Found in WhatsApp > API Setup

fields.label: Meta Business Account ID
fields.description: Found in WhatsApp > API Setup
Our actual bulk cost from MSG91/Fast2SMS per SMS. Update as volume scales.
fields.label: SMS Cost to Platform (₹)

fields.description: Coins deducted from restaurant per SMS. Set higher than platform cost to earn margin.
fields.label: SMS Charge (₹)

fields.description: Our actual cost per WhatsApp marketing conversation (Meta BSP + API overhead).
fields.label: WhatsApp Cost to Platform (₹)

fields.description: Coins deducted from restaurant per WhatsApp message. Current margin: ₹0.43.
fields.label: WhatsApp Charge (₹)

fields.description: Our actual cost per email via Amazon SES or Resend.
fields.label: Email Cost to Platform (₹)

fields.description: Coins deducted per Email sent. High margin channel.
fields.label: Email Charge (₹)

fields.description: API key from Resend.com for Email campaigns.
fields.label: Resend API Key

fields.description: From address for all marketing emails sent via Flamezo.
fields.label: Campaign From Email

fields.description: Pre-approved WhatsApp Business Template name (e.g. restaurant_campaign_v1). Required for Meta-compliant outbound marketing.
fields.label: WhatsApp Campaign Template Name (Meta BSP)

fields.description: Maximum marketing messages a customer can receive within the fatigue window.
fields.label: Max Messages per Window

fields.description: Number of days for the frequency capping window.
fields.label: Fatigue Window (Days)
Flash Store ID (Global)
fields.description: Store ID from uEngage Flash dashboard. Production Store ID: 68035. All restaurant deliveries are routed through this Flamezo aggregator account.

fields.label: Flash Webhook Header Key
fields.description: Header Key configured in uEngage Dashboard > Configuration > Configure Webhook (e.g. Authorization). Used to verify incoming Flash status callbacks.

fields.label: Flash Webhook Header Value (Secret)
fields.description: Header Value / secret token configured in uEngage Dashboard > Configure Webhook (e.g. Bearer xxx). Keep this private.

fields.label: Logistics Platform Fee (₹)
fields.description: Fee Flamezo earns for every delivery booked through the system.

fields.label: Charge GST on Platform Costs
fields.description: If enabled, 18% GST (or custom rate) will be added to coin purchases and other platform charges.
